channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.3.0
item.description:
• Supports all new M1 Pro/Max/Ultra devices
  • Implements native update support (so downloading every new release is no longer necessary)
  • Adds support to 10.11-15, stretching all the way back to OS X El Capitan!

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.3.1
item.description: • Adds preliminary Ventura icon to the main page before Apple makes one themselves

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.3.2
item.description:
• Triple monitor support added
  • Support for Sidecar iPad displays added
  • Added the ability to toggle the visibility of the serial number for security
  • Inverted the remaining storage bar
  • Added a message in the Support tab

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.3.3
item.description: • Fixes OS detection on newer Ventura betas

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.4.0
item.description:
• Implement async functions for collecting data, cutting launch time in half (or more!)
  • Better Stability

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.5.0
item.description:
• New Big-Sur-style icon!!!
  • Add RAM speed and type (i.e. DDR3, DDR4, etc.)

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.6.0
item.description:
Happy New Year! We have some exciting changes that should hopefully fix all crashing problems!\n Changelog:
  • Crashing resolved due to out of bounds error
  • Async replaced in favor of a more backwards-compatible and lighter-weight option

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.7.0
item.description:
Wow, I can't believe it's almost spring! And with spring comes a new release of About This Hack! Enjoy :)\n Changelog:
  • Added Clover Bootloader Support
  • Added Button on Main Screen for System Report
  • Added Button on Main Screen for Software Updates
  • Added support for the new Mac Mini and MacBook Pro 14 and 16 inch models
  • Substantially Cut Down the Size of the App (You're Welcome)

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.7.1
item.description:
Hey everyone, quick adjustment from 0.7.0. Changelog:
  • Added ES, FR, RO (Spanish, French, Romanian) localizations
  • Fixed small UI bugs

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.8.0
item.description:
Happy June! Major updates from the previous release that you don't want to miss! Changelog:
  • HardwareCollector.swift now determines what Mac you have much more efficiently, cutting down 300 lines of code! 😯
  • macOS 14 Sonoma is now fully-supported, including a new icon 🎉
  • A cool attribution line now appears at the bottom of the main tab 🍇
  • "Apple UEFI" now shows up as the bootloader when not using OpenCore/Clover 🍀
  • Other minor bug fixes and improvements that aren't important enough to mention 🤪

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.8.1
item.description:
Minor bug fix release... Changelog:
  • Fixed the minimum required version of macOS to 10.12 (previously set incorrectly to 10.14.6)

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.9.0
item.description:
The final major release before stable...maybe...👀 Changelog:
  • 🎉CUT LAUNCH TIME IN HALF 🎉
  • Added Dual-GPU Support
  • Cleaned Up the Code
  • Temporarily Removed Localizations to Improve Performance
  • Changed How Commands are Handled
  • Added Model Identifier

channel.title: About This Hack Changelog
channel.description: Most recent changes in the latest update.

item.title: Version 0.9.1
item.description:
Just some quick tweaks and bug fixes! Changelog:
  • 🎉CUT LAUNCH TIME IN HALF 🎉
  • Fixed some formatting issues with dual-GPUs
  • The "Bootloader" category now shows "Apple iBoot" for Apple Silicon Macs
  • Resolved a bunch of pesky errors
